summary: Menu page reorganization and Feature Permissions system testing complete. All requirements verified: 6 sections in Menu (My Tools, Campaigns, Content, Insights, Administration, Settings), permissions API working, permissions UI functional, My Account page cleaned up with My Performance shortcut.

menu_6_sections.details: All 6 sections visible: My Tools, Campaigns, Content, Insights, Administration, Settings

menu_my_tools_items.details: My Tools contains: Today's Touchpoints, Ask Jessi, Training Hub, Team Chat

menu_campaigns_items.details: Campaigns contains: SMS Campaigns, Email Campaigns, Campaign Dashboard, Broadcast, Date Triggers

menu_content_items.details: Content contains: SMS Templates, Email Templates, Card Templates, Manage Showcase

menu_insights_items.details: Insights contains: My Performance, Activity Reports, Email Analytics, Leaderboard, Lead Attribution

menu_admin_role_gated.details: Administration section visible for admin roles only (super_admin/org_admin/manager)

menu_settings_items.details: Settings contains: Security, Calendar, Help Center

menu_sections_expand_collapse.details: All sections are collapsible with chevron indicator

my_account_performance_shortcut.details: My Performance shortcut card visible at top of My Account page with data-testid='my-performance-link'

my_account_no_quick_actions_grid.details: Quick Actions grid not rendered in main UI (code exists but not in visible layout)

my_account_billing_rewards.details: Billing & Rewards section visible with Upgrade Plan option

my_account_settings_simplified.details: Settings section shows Security, Notifications, Calendar

backend_get_permissions.details: GET /api/admin/permissions/{user_id} returns merged permissions with all 4 sections

login_feature_permissions.details: Login response includes feature_permissions field with section toggles

permissions_page_ui.details: Feature Permissions page at /admin/users/permissions/{id} shows section toggles (My Tools, Campaigns, Content, Insights) with individual feature toggles

permissions_save_button.details: Save button visible in top-right corner of permissions page

permissions_enable_all.details: 'Enable All Features' toggle visible at top of permissions page

user_detail_manage_permissions_btn.details: 'Manage Permissions' button visible on user detail page (/admin/users/{id})

critical_code_review_comments: Menu sections correctly use permission filtering via perm() and filterItems() functions
Administration section is properly role-gated (isAdmin check) rather than permission-based
Feature Permissions page shows section-level toggles (_enabled) + individual item toggles as designed
User Detail page has 'Manage Permissions' button that navigates to /admin/users/permissions/{id}

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All menu sections and permissions UI verified)

seed_data_creation: None required - tested with existing super admin user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Menu page reorganized into 6 sections: My Tools, Campaigns, Content, Insights, Administration (admin-only), Settings. Feature Permissions system fully working with GET/PUT /api/admin/permissions/{user_id} endpoints. Permissions page at /admin/users/permissions/{id}. My Account page cleaned up - shows My Performance shortcut, Profile & AI section, Install App, Billing & Rewards, Settings.
